name: academic-blockchain-verification
description: Prototype for academic certificate registration and verification on a local blockchain.

scripts.validate:relay-config: node --input-type=module -e "import('./backend/lib/relay-config.js').then(async ({ loadRelayRuntimeConfig }) => { const config = await loadRelayRuntimeConfig(); console.log(JSON.stringify({ chainId: config.chainId, contractAddress: config.contractAddress, issuerAddress: config.issuerAddress, relayBaseUrl: config.relayBaseUrl, storagePath: config.storagePath }, null, 2)); }).catch((error) => { console.error(error.stack ?? error.message); process.exit(1); });"
scripts.prepare:pages: npm run validate:public-config && npm run build:pages
scripts.test: npm run test:contract && npm run test:integration
